Update [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] (a) include the one-line tie-breaker policy clarifying whether directionality or confounder overrides priority when abs(residual_points) is within the tolerance and the exact precedence order; (b) add the explicit derivation of the 5-point tolerance from sensitivity_shift_pct and the 0-100 scale assumption; (c) paste the small code snippet used to compute the linear-fit parameters and the exact intercept/slope used.
